display.purpose: Hero headlines and singular brand moments. Crimson Text. Used once per major view.

headline.purpose: Section headings, modal titles, dashboard headers. Crimson Text.

title.purpose: Card titles, block headers, sub-section labels. Inter sans.

body.purpose: All readable text, descriptions, form content. Inter. Max 70ch.

label.purpose: Data labels, timestamps, metadata, stat headers. Geist Mono uppercase.

shadows.name: surface-rest
shadows.purpose: Default state for BMC cells and panels.

shadows.name: card-hover
shadows.purpose: Canvas cards on hover — indigo aura.

shadows.name: glow-critical
shadows.purpose: Critical state — urgent but not alarming.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The main action trigger — amber ink gradient with physical depth.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { position: relative; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 10px 20px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid rgba(160,128,64,0.45); font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1; color: #2a2520; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none; background: linear-gradient(180deg, #c4a35a 0%, #a08040 100%); box-shadow: 0 2px 6px rgba(42,37,32,0.08), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.25); transition: transform 180ms ease, box-shadow 220ms ease, border-color 220ms ease, background 220ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); background: linear-gradient(180deg, #d4b36a 0%, #b08f4a 100%); border-color: rgba(160,128,64,0.6); box-shadow: 0 3px 10px rgba(42,37,32,0.12), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.3); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(42,37,32,0.08), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.22); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Secondary action with soft parchment presence.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { position: relative; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 10px 20px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid rgba(42,37,32,0.1); font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1; color: #2a2520; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none; background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(42,37,32,0.06) 0%, rgba(42,37,32,0.03) 100%); box-shadow: 0 12px 24px rgba(42,37,32,0.05), 0 4px 10px rgba(42,37,32,0.04), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.5); transition: transform 180ms ease, box-shadow 220ms ease, border-color 220ms ease, background 220ms ease; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(42,37,32,0.09) 0%, rgba(42,37,32,0.05) 100%); border-color: rgba(42,37,32,0.14); box-shadow: 0 16px 30px rgba(42,37,32,0.07), 0 0 22px rgba(99,102,241,0.06), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.6); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Tertiary action — minimal presence, reveals on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { position: relative; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 10px 20px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid rgba(42,37,32,0.06); font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1; color: #7a7268; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none; background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(42,37,32,0.03) 0%, rgba(42,37,32,0.01) 100%); box-shadow: 0 8px 16px rgba(42,37,32,0.03), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.4); transition: transform 180ms ease, box-shadow 220ms ease, border-color 220ms ease, background 220ms ease, color 220ms ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); color: #2a2520; border-color: rgba(42,37,32,0.12); background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(42,37,32,0.06) 0%, rgba(42,37,32,0.03) 100%); box-shadow: 0 12px 24px rgba(42,37,32,0.05), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.5); }

components.name: Soft Input
components.description: Primary text field with white paper surface and amber focus ignition.
components.css: .ds-input-soft { width: 100%; padding: 12px 16px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid rgba(42,37,32,0.12); font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.5; color: #2a2520; background: #ffffff; box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.6), 0 8px 18px rgba(42,37,32,0.04); outline: none; transition: border-color 180ms ease, box-shadow 220ms ease, background 180ms ease; } .ds-input-soft::placeholder { color: rgba(122,114,104,0.55); } .ds-input-soft:focus { border-color: rgba(196,163,90,0.65); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(196,163,90,0.12), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.7), 0 12px 24px rgba(42,37,32,0.06); }

components.name: Canvas Card
components.description: Project card on the dashboard — subtle, lifts with indigo aura on hover.
components.html:
Airbnb for Dogs

A platform connecting dog owners with trusted sitters.
components.css: .ds-canvas-card { position: relative; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid rgba(42,37,32,0.06); border-radius: 14px; padding: 20px; cursor: pointer; overflow: hidden; transition: all 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-canvas-card::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; border-radius: inherit; background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(99,102,241,0.03), rgba(236,72,153,0.03)); opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.25s ease; } .ds-canvas-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); border-color: rgba(99,102,241,0.16); box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(99,102,241,0.06), 0 0 0 1px rgba(99,102,241,0.08); } .ds-canvas-card:hover::before { opacity: 1; } .ds-canvas-card-title { font-family: 'Crimson Text', Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.15rem; font-weight: 600; color: #2a2520; margin: 0 0 0.25rem; position: relative; z-index: 1; } .ds-canvas-card-desc { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.78rem; color: #7a7268; line-height: 1.35; margin: 0; position: relative; z-index: 1; }

components.name: Stat Card
components.description: Dashboard metric card with paper surface and gradient number.
components.css: .ds-stat-card { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.7); border: 1px solid rgba(42,37,32,0.06); border-radius: 14px; padding: 20px; flex: 1; min-width: 0; } .ds-stat-label { font-family: 'Geist Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.7rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; color: #7a7268; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; } .ds-stat-number { font-family: 'Geist Mono', monospace; font-size: 1.75rem; font-weight: 700; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #2a2520 30%, #c4a35a); -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; background-clip: text; line-height: 1.1; }

components.name: BMC Cell Panel
components.description: Business Model Canvas block — state communicated via top border color.
components.html:
Value Propositions
Hosts: Extra income. Guests: Unique experiences.
components.css: .ds-bmc-cell { display: flex; flex-direction: column; border-radius: 10px; overflow: visible; min-height: 120px; border: 1px solid rgba(42,37,32,0.06); border-top-width: 2px; border-top-color: rgba(42,37,32,0.1); background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #faf7ef 100%); box-shadow: 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.6) inset, 0 8px 18px rgba(42,37,32,0.04), 0 0 0 1px rgba(42,37,32,0.04); transition: border-color 220ms ease, border-top-color 220ms ease, background 220ms ease, box-shadow 220ms ease; } .ds-bmc-cell:hover { border-color: rgba(42,37,32,0.1); background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #f5f0e3 100%); box-shadow: 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.7) inset, 0 10px 20px rgba(42,37,32,0.06), 0 0 0 1px rgba(42,37,32,0.06); } .ds-bmc-cell-header { font-family: 'Geist Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.65rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; color: #7a7268; padding: 10px 12px 4px; } .ds-bmc-cell-content { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.5; color: #2a2520; padding: 0 12px 12px; flex: 1; } .ds-bmc-cell.ds-state-healthy { border-top-color: rgba(34,197,94,0.55); } .ds-bmc-cell.ds-state-warning { border-top-color: rgba(245,158,11,0.58); } .ds-bmc-cell.ds-state-critical { border-top-color: rgba(239,68,68,0.62); } .ds-bmc-cell.ds-state-ai { border-top-color: rgba(99,102,241,0.62); }

components.name: Tag Pill
components.description: AI-generated label with pulsing indigo dot.
components.css: .ds-tag-pill { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 100px; border: 1px solid rgba(99,102,241,0.15); background: rgba(99,102,241,0.05); font-family: 'Geist Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; color: rgba(99,102,241,0.8); } .ds-tag-dot { width: 5px; height: 5px; border-radius: 50%; background: #6366f1; animation: ds-pulse-dot 3s ease-in-out infinite; } @keyframes ds-pulse-dot { 0%, 100% { opacity: 0.4; } 50% { opacity: 1; } }

components.name: User Avatar
components.css: .ds-user-avatar { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 50%; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #6366f1, #ec4899); color: #fff; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.8rem; letter-spacing: -0.02em; flex-shrink: 0; }

narrative.northStar: The Sunlit Studio by day, Da Vinci's Workshop by night
narrative.overview: RocketMap is the founder's drafting table — morning light across aged paper, ink still wet, sketches pinned to a warm wooden wall. The interface should feel like sitting down with a fresh sheet of parchment and a pen that knows what to ask. Every surface carries the warmth of handmade paper and the quiet confidence of tools that have been used for centuries. This system rejects the cold minimalism of modern SaaS dashboards and the dopamine-driven gamification of consumer apps. It embraces daylight, texture, and the deliberate slowness of serious thought. The light ground is not 'light mode' — it is the page itself, the medium onto which an idea is pressed. RocketMap now supports two complementary atmospheres: The Sunlit Studio (Warm Parchment) for focused daytime work, and Da Vinci's Workshop (dark) for late-night sessions. A user-controlled theme toggle, powered by next-themes, switches every surface, ink, and accent between the two palettes.
keyCharacteristics: Warm parchment-dominant surfaces with subtle paper grain
Renaissance serif display type for headings, humanist sans for body, drafting mono for data
State expressed through colored top borders and warm ink accents, not badges or banners
Chromatic accents used sparingly for AI presence and ink effects
Every interactive element responds with physical weight — lift on hover, press on active
Theme-aware surfaces and inks that invert through CSS custom properties while preserving pigment rarity and tactile motion

rules.name: The Pigment Rarity Rule
rules.body: The chromatic palette appears on ≤15% of any given screen. Its rarity is the point — these are precious pigments, not wall paint.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: The display font (Crimson Text) is used for at most one headline per screen. Everything else is Inter or Geist Mono. The serif is a privilege, not a default.

rules.name: The Daylight Rule
rules.body: Shadows are warm-tinted (rgba(42,37,32,...)) and never pure black. Highlights come from above, simulating a tall window to the left of the desk.

dos: Do use the Daylight Rule — warm-tinted shadows and soft top highlights on elevated surfaces.
Do let the parchment ground dominate. The Parchment Ground background should cover 80%+ of any screen.
Do use state-colored top borders (2px) on BMC cells to indicate health.
Do use Crimson Text display font for one headline per view. Let it breathe.
Do use Geist Mono with uppercase + 0.08em tracking for all data labels and metadata.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion — the shimmer and pulse animations are decorative, not functional.
Do use CSS custom properties (var(--background), var(--foreground), var(--primary), etc.) so components respond automatically to the light/dark theme toggle.
donts: Don't use corporate blue dashboards (McKinsey, Salesforce aesthetics).
Don't use Notion-clone minimalism (endless white space, ghostly typography).
Don't use gamified/confetti UI (celebration animations, progress badges, dopamine loops).
Don't use the hero-metric template (big number, small label, supporting stats, gradient accent).
Don't use side-stripe borders (border-left or border-right > 1px as a colored accent on cards, lists, or callouts).
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with gradients) for body or headings.
Don't use glassmorphism as a default.
Don't use identical card grids (icon + heading + text, repeated endlessly).
Don't make modals the first solution.
Don't use em dashes — use commas, colons, semicolons, periods, or parentheses.
